creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Comment on attachment 211923
bind916 new defaults

On second thought...
Since the history of geoip / the new defaults,
then maybe it wont hurt to change

GEOIP_CONFIGURE_OFF=		--disable-geoip

to

GEOIP_CONFIGURE_OFF=		--disable-geoip \
                                --without-geoip2 \
                                --without-maxminddb
